description: A group of episodes sharing a common governance boundary design and data architecture.
title: Project

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.

architecture.description: The data architecture governing how records are held and linked.
architecture.title: Architecture

deliveryCouplingProxy.description: The coupling proxy of the delivery episode.
deliveryCouplingProxy.title: Delivery Coupling Proxy

deliveryEpisode.description: The episode whose delivered value corresponds to the first data product.
deliveryEpisode.title: Delivery Episode

ecosystem.description: The ecosystem this project belongs to.
ecosystem.title: Ecosystem

episodeCount.description: Number of governance episodes in this project.
episodeCount.title: Episode Count

normalizedBurden.description: Project time to delivered value per unit of delivery-episode coupling load.
normalizedBurden.title: Normalized Burden

partnerCount.description: Number of institutional actors contributing data in the delivery episode.
partnerCount.title: Partner Count

stallFraction.description: Proportion of episodes in the project that stalled.
stallFraction.title: Stall Fraction

stewardPresence.description: Whether the project includes an authorized domain representative who mediates governance requests.
stewardPresence.title: Steward Presence

t0.description: The earliest episode initiation timestamp across all episodes in the project.
t0.title: Project Start

tau2.description: Calendar days from the earliest episode initiation to delivery of the first analytic output.
tau2.title: Time to Delivered Value
